title: Playground Action Cards
concept: A beginner-oriented action board for plugin developers that groups Playground creation, saving, management, inspection, and export tasks into clear cards beside a split live preview and contextual editor.
focus: high-contrast black white and cyan palette
flows: Start a Playground from vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, zip import, featured blueprints, or the full Blueprint gallery.
Save a temporary Playground to browser storage or a local directory with visible file-copy progress and unsaved-state messaging.
Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds with resume, rename, delete, and safe delete language.
Use Site Manager cards for runtime settings, file browsing and code editing, Blueprint editing, database tools, logs, exports, and downloads while the live WordPress preview remains visible.
Navigate the active WordPress site with path, refresh, Homepage, and WP Admin controls.
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
understand destructive reset and saved reload behavior
use File browser with create folder/file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
